concept_decisions.retained_canonical_name: Empirical burden and ascertainment measurement studies
concept_decisions.labels_compared: fallback vs empirical measurement; surveillance evaluation; safety surveillance; burden inference; transmission models; spatial models; policy/economic evaluation; evidence synthesis
concept_decisions.evidence_inspected: Manifest, named concept table, and all 150 titles plus complete available abstracts in the named records file.
concept_decisions.rationale: The fallback bucket mixes multiple incompatible study designs and cannot remain final.

reassignments.to_canonical_name: Surveillance system evaluation and reporting-quality studies

new_concepts.canonical_name: Surveillance system evaluation and reporting-quality studies
new_concepts.rationale: Covers audits of completeness, compliance, workflow, registry accuracy, and surveillance strengthening.
Covers vaccine or drug safety monitoring and adverse-event reporting studies.
Covers models built to infer hidden infections, deaths, burden, or reporting multipliers.
Covers models centered on transmission processes, reproduction, variants, or future trajectories.
Covers geographic clustering, mapping, and spatiotemporal estimation designs.
Covers intervention-effect, vaccination-strategy, cost-effectiveness, and economic-burden studies.

new_concepts.canonical_name: Evidence syntheses on burden, surveillance, and reporting gaps
new_concepts.rationale: Covers systematic reviews, meta-analyses, and scoping reviews.
